entry.data:
SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING WEST AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
